sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the bridge pattern at current position vs after moving UP
# Current: player at rows 36-39
# Let me get the bridge pattern (white/gray cells)

def get_bridge_pattern(frame):
    seg = frame.segmentation
    bridge = []
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('w', 'g'):
            r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            r_max = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            c_max = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            # Bridge is horizontal, near player row
            if 15 <= c_min <= 45 and r_min < 50:
                bridge.append((n['color'], r_min, c_min, c_max))
    return sorted(bridge, key=lambda x: (x[1], x[2]))

print("Current bridge pattern:")
bridge = get_bridge_pattern(current_frame)
for b in bridge[:20]:  # First 20 segments
    print(f"  {b[0]}: row {b[1]}, cols {b[2]}-{b[3]}")

# Now move UP and check bridge pattern
action(['UP', 'UP'])
print("\nAfter UPx2:")
bridge2 = get_bridge_pattern(current_frame)
for b in bridge2[:20]:
    print(f"  {b[0]}: row {b[1]}, cols {b[2]}-{b[3]}")

# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and min(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) < 50:
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"\nPlayer row: {r_min}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Let me check the bridge pattern at current position vs after moving UP
# Current: player at rows 36-39
# Let me get the bridge pattern (white/gray cells)

def get_bridge_pattern(frame):
    seg = frame.segmentation
    bridge = []
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('w', 'g'):
            r_min = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            r_max = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            c_min = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            c_max = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            # Bridge is horizontal, near player row
            if 15 <= c_min <= 45 and r_min < 50:
                bridge.append((n['color'], r_min, c_min, c_max))
    return sorted(bridge, key=lambda x: (x[1], x[2]))

print("Current bridge pattern:")

for b in bridge[:20]:  # First 20 segments
    print(f"  {b[0]}: row {b[1]}, cols {b[2]}-{b[3]}")
